focus: Cockpits & Interior — all rarities (cockpits, dashboard lighting, canopy tints, bobbleheads, photos, ambience)

items.name: Industrial Rust Cockpit
items.description: Working-class cockpit with visible wear, patinated copper fittings, and honest rivets.
items.flavor_text: Rust on the trim, calibration on the dot. The cockpit keeps its priorities straight.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, industrial wear with patinated copper fittings and honest rivets, utilitarian working-class warmth

items.name: Minimalist Glass Cockpit
items.description: Minimalist glass-and-alloy cockpit with clean sight lines and low-profile instrument strip.
items.flavor_text: The cockpit says almost nothing. What it does say is exactly what the pilot needed.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, minimalist glass and alloy with clean sight lines and low-profile instrument strip, modern quiet

items.name: Carbon Fiber Cockpit
items.description: Exposed carbon-fiber panels under clear lacquer with brushed aluminum accents on the switch bank.
items.flavor_text: Lightweight philosophy, pressed under glass. Every gram tells the pilot something true.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, exposed carbon fiber under clear lacquer with brushed aluminum switch bank accents, tech-refined

items.name: Pristine Chrome Cockpit
items.description: High-polish chrome cockpit, spotless and showroom-bright. Every console panel catches the canopy light.
items.flavor_text: Somebody cleans this cockpit every evening. The pilot denies it. The mirror disagrees.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, high-polish chrome with spotless console panels catching canopy light, showroom premium

items.name: Battle-Worn Veteran Cockpit
items.description: Scarred veteran cockpit with scorch marks, field-patched panels, and a hand-stitched seat cover.
items.flavor_text: Nothing in the cockpit was installed new. Nothing in it failed the pilot either.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, scarred veteran with scorch marks field-patched panels and hand-stitched seat cover, weathered trusted

items.name: Gilded Cockpit
items.description: Gilded cockpit with fine gold-leaf panel trim, inlaid walnut dash, and soft amber interior lighting.
items.flavor_text: The cockpit signals wealth the pilot has never explained. Nobody asks about it twice.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, gold leaf panel trim inlaid walnut dash and soft amber interior lighting, ornate luxurious

items.name: Ancient Relic Cockpit
items.description: Reclaimed pre-voidexa relic cockpit with etched bronze panels and alien glyph readouts pulsing softly.
items.flavor_text: The glyphs mean nothing modern. The cockpit still understands the pilot perfectly.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, reclaimed relic with etched bronze panels and softly pulsing alien glyph readouts, archaeological mystic

items.name: Crystal Cathedral Cockpit
items.description: Translucent crystal cathedral cockpit with animated inner refraction and soft rainbow light moving along the facets during flight.
items.flavor_text: The cockpit hums softly when the pilot is happy. Only the cockpit notices.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit interior model, translucent crystal cathedral with animated inner refraction and moving rainbow facet light, legendary ethereal

items.name: Dashboard Lighting Red
items.description: Red interior dashboard backlight, night-combat visibility preset. Easy on the eyes at speed.
items.flavor_text: Red lights so the eyes keep up with the sky. A small mercy.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, red interior illumination preset, night-combat visibility, classic aviation

items.name: Dashboard Lighting Green
items.description: Green interior dashboard backlight with subtle glow around every control. Instruments read crisp and calm.
items.flavor_text: Green for the pilot who thinks in terms of go, not warning. Go, then.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, green interior illumination with subtle glow around controls, calm instrument read

items.name: Dashboard Lighting Amber
items.description: Warm amber dashboard backlight with soft vintage glow across every gauge. Comfortable at every hour.
items.flavor_text: The amber remembers hangars the pilot stopped thinking about years ago. Comforting.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, warm amber illumination with soft vintage glow across gauges, nostalgic comfortable

items.name: Dashboard Lighting Blue
items.description: Cold blue dashboard backlight with clinical readability under any cockpit ambient condition.
items.flavor_text: Cold light for cold decisions. The pilot makes both, usually on schedule.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, cold blue illumination with clinical readability, technical precise

items.name: Dashboard Lighting White
items.description: Neutral white dashboard backlight with sharp edge contrast. Every needle reads at a glance.
items.flavor_text: Honest light. Shows what is there, withholds nothing, flatters no pilot.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, neutral white illumination with sharp edge contrast, clean honest readability

items.name: Dashboard Lighting Purple
items.description: Deep violet dashboard backlight with velvet glow around every display bezel and panel seam.
items.flavor_text: Purple for the pilot who prefers atmosphere over information. They get both.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, deep violet illumination with velvet glow around bezels and panel seams, moody aesthetic

items.name: Dashboard Lighting Stealth Black
items.description: Ultra-low dashboard illumination with only dim red pinpoints for critical readouts. Cockpit reads as off.
items.flavor_text: The cockpit prefers to be invisible. The pilot learns to fly by feel.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, ultra-low illumination with dim red pinpoints on critical readouts only, stealth night-ops

items.name: Dashboard Lighting Pulsing Rainbow
items.description: Animated rainbow dashboard backlight cycling through full spectrum at a slow, steady heartbeat tempo.
items.flavor_text: The pilot pretends the color cycle is accidental. Nobody in the hangar is convinced.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard backlight, animated rainbow cycling full spectrum at slow heartbeat tempo, arcade playful

items.name: Canopy Tint Smoked
items.description: Neutral smoked canopy tint. Reduces glare, keeps visibility clean, hides the pilot's expression to outside observers.
items.flavor_text: The canopy keeps the pilot's face private. The pilot keeps thanking it quietly.
items.art_prompt_hints: canopy glass tint, neutral smoked with clean visibility and glare reduction, understated practical

items.name: Canopy Tint Ocean Blue
items.description: Cool ocean-blue canopy tint that casts a soft blue wash across the cockpit interior in daylight.
items.flavor_text: Every view through the canopy looks a little kinder. The pilot takes it, no questions.
items.art_prompt_hints: canopy glass tint, cool ocean blue casting soft wash across cockpit interior, calming daylight filter

items.name: Canopy Tint Blood Red
items.description: Deep blood-red canopy tint with aggressive color wash across the cockpit interior and a tinted gold rim seal.
items.flavor_text: Red canopy. The pilot's mood arrives ten minutes before the pilot does. Usually.
items.art_prompt_hints: canopy glass tint, deep blood red with tinted gold rim seal, aggressive bold presence

items.name: Canopy Tint Gold
items.description: Warm gold canopy tint with luxurious amber wash across the cockpit and soft sparkle along the frame rim.
items.flavor_text: Gold glass for the pilot who understands photographs. The cockpit photographs beautifully.
items.art_prompt_hints: canopy glass tint, warm gold with amber wash across cockpit and soft sparkle along frame rim, luxurious

items.name: Canopy Tint Chrome
items.description: Mirror-finish chrome canopy tint. Interior reads clear to pilot, exterior shows the outside world reflected back.
items.flavor_text: The canopy shows the outside back to itself. The pilot watches from behind the mirror.
items.art_prompt_hints: canopy glass tint, mirror finish chrome with interior clarity and exterior reflection, one-way mirror aesthetic

items.name: Canopy Tint Iridescent
items.description: Iridescent canopy tint that shifts through pastel spectrum on angle. Interior still reads neutral to the pilot.
items.flavor_text: The canopy picks a color the pilot did not. It picks well, eventually, every time.
items.art_prompt_hints: canopy glass tint, iridescent shifting pastel spectrum on angle with neutral interior read, rare prismatic

items.name: Classic Astronaut Bobblehead
items.description: Classic white-suited astronaut bobblehead with a gold-visor helmet. Nods gently with ship motion.
items.flavor_text: Keeps nodding. Agrees with most of the pilot's choices. Rarely wrong.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit bobblehead figurine, classic white suited astronaut with gold visor helmet nodding on spring base, nostalgic toy

items.name: Rubber Duck Bobblehead
items.description: Small yellow rubber duck mounted on the dashboard. Bobs with every turn, judges quietly.
items.flavor_text: Programmer's companion. Waits patiently for the pilot to explain the problem out loud.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit bobblehead figurine, small yellow rubber duck on spring base bobbing on dashboard, playful iconic

items.name: Dice Bobblehead
items.description: Pair of red fuzzy dice hanging from the canopy rail. Classic pilot ritual, zero tactical value.
items.flavor_text: The pilot does not trust the dice. The dice have been fine with that arrangement.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit hanging ornament, pair of red fuzzy dice hanging from canopy rail swinging with motion, kitsch hot-rod mood

items.name: Mini Ship Model Bobblehead
items.description: Scale model of a Voidrunner fighter pinned to the dashboard on a short spring mount. Tilts on banks.
items.flavor_text: A small ship inside the ship. The pilot pretends this is normal.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard figurine, tiny scale model voidrunner fighter on short spring mount tilting with banks, hobbyist charming

items.name: Miniature Star Bobblehead
items.description: Glass-enclosed miniature luminous star that pulses faintly on a spring base. Subtle, quiet, pretty.
items.flavor_text: A sun in a jar, sort of. The pilot checks it whenever the sky disappoints.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard figurine, glass enclosed miniature luminous star pulsing faintly on spring base, magical subtle

items.name: Voidexa Logo Bobblehead
items.description: Chromed voidexa house emblem on a spring mount. Signals loyalty without requiring a conversation.
items.flavor_text: The logo answers for the pilot when asked about allegiance. It has not needed correction.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard figurine, chromed voidexa house emblem on spring mount, brand-official quietly proud

items.name: Luck Dragon Bobblehead
items.description: Tiny green serpent dragon coiled around a gold pillar, nodding gently on every turn. Claimed lucky by old pilots.
items.flavor_text: The dragon has never let the pilot down. It has also never been tested seriously.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard figurine, tiny green serpent dragon coiled on gold pillar nodding on turns, mythic lucky charm

items.name: Void Crab Bobblehead
items.description: Small chitinous void-crab figurine with animated claw-waving. Good-luck trinket from the salvage circuit.
items.flavor_text: The crab waves at pirates. Pirates wave back, most days. Communication.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard figurine, small chitinous void crab with animated claw waving, quirky salvage-circuit charm

items.name: Jix Miniature Bobblehead
items.description: Painted miniature of voidexa's founder Jix, suited up and nodding approvingly on a small silver plinth.
items.flavor_text: The miniature nods approval at every landing. Occasionally in error, rarely audibly.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard figurine, painted miniature of voidexa founder jix suited up nodding on silver plinth, collectible signature

items.name: Alien Friend Bobblehead
items.description: Animated alien-friend figurine that reacts to cockpit events — waves on warp entry, salutes on victory, tilts during impact.
items.flavor_text: The alien saw everything. Still a friend. Waves regardless. Carries the cockpit's mood.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard figurine, animated alien friend reacting to cockpit events with waves salutes and tilts, legendary charming companion

items.name: Family Photo Frame
items.description: Small brushed-metal frame with a generic faded family portrait preset. Sits on the dash, corner angle.
items.flavor_text: The family waves back every time the pilot glances over. They are also patient.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard item, small brushed metal frame with faded family portrait preset on angled dashboard placement, personal warm

items.name: Pet Portrait Frame
items.description: Walnut-framed oil-painted pet portrait preset on the cockpit dash. Regal composition, mild mischief.
items.flavor_text: The pet outranks the pilot on shore leave. The portrait confirms this, formally.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard item, walnut frame oil painted pet portrait regal composition with mild mischief, sentimental collector

items.name: Custom Upload Slot
items.description: Configurable dashboard frame slot for a pilot-uploaded image. Library-curated options at launch, custom upload in a future sprint.
items.flavor_text: The frame waits for a picture not yet taken. It keeps waiting, patient.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard item, configurable empty frame slot with soft placeholder image, pending-upload UI aesthetic

items.name: Ship Factory Photo
items.description: Vintage sepia print of the original Voidrunner assembly line on an angled brass easel. Collector piece.
items.flavor_text: The factory is gone. Every ship in the frame is still out there.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit dashboard item, vintage sepia print of original voidrunner assembly line on angled brass easel, archival collector piece

items.name: Engine Hum Loop
items.description: Warm, steady reactor hum that loops under the cockpit audio bed at low volume. Grounds the room.
items.flavor_text: The hum never changes. The pilot stops hearing it. The cockpit gets quieter somehow.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit ambient audio loop, warm steady reactor hum low volume underbed, grounding subsonic texture

items.name: Radio Static Ambient
items.description: Soft crackling analog radio static drifting between dead frequencies. Evokes old-war comms chatter.
items.flavor_text: Nobody is transmitting. The static fills in anyway. The pilot finds it reassuring.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit ambient audio loop, soft crackling analog radio static drifting between dead frequencies, old-war comms texture

items.name: Storm Ambient
items.description: Thunderstorm ambience with distant rumble, occasional wind gust, and quiet rain on hull plating.
items.flavor_text: There is no weather out here. The cockpit decided to bring weather along. Kind gesture.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit ambient audio loop, thunderstorm with distant rumble wind gusts and rain on hull plating, atmospheric weather

items.name: Deep Space Silence
items.description: Signature deep-space silence audio layer with sub-audible pressure, faint cosmic-ray pings, and zero comms bleed.
items.flavor_text: The silence is louder than most cockpits allow. The pilot listens until it says something.
items.art_prompt_hints: cockpit ambient audio loop, deep space silence with sub-audible pressure and faint cosmic ray pings zero comms bleed, meditative premium
